name: Spinach Pesto Appetizer Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Philadelphia non-fat cream cheese (8 oz; cut into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly oil a 9-inch springform pan and set aside.
3. Place cottage cheese in a fine sieve and gently press down with a wooden spoon to drain liquid.
4. Transfer the pressed cottage cheese to a food processor.
5. Squeeze excess liquid from spinach and add it to the cottage cheese, along with cream cheese, Romano, egg, egg whites, garlic, basil, salt, and pepper.
6. Process until smooth.
7. Blend with electric beaters until almost smooth.
8. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
9. Bake for about 1 hour, or until firm.
10. Cool on a wire rack.
11. Garnish with cherry tomatoes and fresh basil leaves (if desired).
12. Serve with crackers or French bread.
